tasks.instruction: Uzupełnij poniższe wypowiedzi (1.1.–1.6.), wybierając spośród podanych możliwości. Zakreśl literę A, B albo C.

items.prompt: A: I'm so sorry I spilled coffee on your book! B: _______. It was old anyway.
A: Would you mind passing the salt? B: _______.
A: Could you give me a _______ with these heavy bags? B: Of course, let me help you.
A: I haven't seen you in ages! How have you _______? B: Really well, thanks! And you?
A: I'm going to fail the test tomorrow! B: Take it _______. You've studied hard. You'll be fine.
A: Do you fancy going to the cinema tonight? B: I'd love to, but I'm _______ broke until payday.
